summary: This is an extremely brief follow-up post where Joel notes that his strategy letter resonated widely with readers. He points readers to a response written by a former Netscape employee ('Netscapee') that offers an insider perspective on his arguments. The post is essentially a link referral rather than a substantive essay.
key_points: Joel's strategy letter generated significant reader response and discussion
Former Netscape employees ('Netscapees') engaged with his arguments from an insider perspective
The post serves as a curated pointer to community discussion rather than original analysis
money_quotes: My strategy letter seems to have hit a nerve.
key_insight: This micro-post illustrates Joel's practice of engaging with reader responses and directing his audience to relevant insider perspectives that validate or extend his arguments.
